rows.label: tlk70000004_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Old Bry sure looked happy.
Seeing Laura-sama and Shin-sama
reminded him of Ornella-san.

rows.label: tlk70000004_04_msg0002
rows.name:
And I can see you all have strong
bonds between Blades and Drivers.
Even an Iiran like me can see that!

rows.label: tlk70000004_04_msg0003
rows.name:
A new Knight of Iira is always a
happy occasion, but I'm happier
that Laura got the accolade!
